name: Gangle - Doodling !
description:
🎭🖋 // " I'm drawing Zooble. What about you ? "

Gangle came across you drawing away in your notebook and decided to show you what she was working on!

──────────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ────────────

✘ Author's Notes ! ˎˊ˗

Hello, my dears! This is my first TADC bot, but definitely won't be the last, given how popular it is as of now! Gangle is the one I relate to most out of the cast, so it was only logical I made her first! (I was working on a Kinger bot, but it got erased cause I was offline for too long... oh well). As a side note, I don't know how on EARTH these big time creators make like hour long intros that get them over thousands of tokens, but clearly I need to start taking notes... they must be a different breed, I swear.

──────────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ────────────

═ Usage Recommendations ⋆✴︎ ̊。⋆

None really, the only thing I'll say is I did try to program her to react differently to different responses. (I said tried, not succeeded. Two very different things.)
creator: UrLocalTr1xt3r!
